title: Shared wire primitive definitions
description: Primitive types shared across the lazily IPC schemas (snapshot, delta, distributed). Referenced via absolute $ref so every wire schema stays codec-faithful to protocol.md without copy-drift.

NodeId.description: Wire-stable node identifier (u64). JavaScript/TypeScript peers must keep values at or below Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER (2^53).

PeerId.description: Wire-stable peer identifier (u64, must stay ≤ Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER).

NodeKey.description: Optional wire-stable keyed address: a '/'-joined path (e.g. 'scores/alice'). The pattern rejects empty/leading/trailing/double slashes; construction-time code also enforces the ≤1024 *byte* and ≤32 *segment* bounds (see protocol.md § NodeKey). Serialized as a bare string; the field is omitted in self-describing codecs when absent.

ShmBlobRef.description: Descriptor into a shared-memory blob arena.

NodeState.description: Externally-tagged node body: concrete bytes, a shared-memory value, or an opaque (visible but non-serializable) node.

Payload.description: Serialized value bytes as JSON array of u8 (NOT base64).

IpcValue.description: Externally-tagged delta payload: inline bytes or a shared-memory blob reference.

Inline.description: Inline serialized bytes as JSON array of u8 (NOT base64).

WireStamp.description: Wire mirror of the runtime HLC stamp — a total order (wall_time, logical, peer).

wall_time.description: Wall-clock microseconds since the Unix epoch.

logical.description: Logical counter advancing causality within equal wall_time.

peer.description: Originating peer; final tiebreak so equal (wall, logical) is a total order.
